first_line: O friends of God! The eventide draweth nigh and the sun setteth, and these fingers grow weary from abundant writing [3.5s]... ...O Thou Pure and Omnipotent God!  O Thou my kind Lord!  Grant me such power as to enable me to withstand the onslaught of the peoples and kindreds of the world, and give us such might as to cause the waves of our endeavors, like unto the Pacific Ocean

translations.text:
## Pule no ka Moana PakÔpika
* Prayer for the Pacific

E ke Akua Hemolele a me ka Mana Loa! E ku'u Akua ˇOlu'olu! E ha'awi mai i ke ikaika nui i hiki ia kakou ke pale aku i na pilikia o ka honua holo'okoa, e ha'awi mai i ka mana nui hekau aku ka ˇale o ko kakou na'au lawelawe e kau aku i ka Moana PakÔpika, e pae aku i na kapa kai o ka Hikina a hiki i ke Komohana.
